'''APA-5 droid''' were [[Droid/Legends|droids]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to serve meals in military mess halls. They had limited intelligence and if put into a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] would be unable to do anything but keep it in a steady orbit. [[Kir Kanos]] took one of them to [[Yinchorr/Legends|Yinchorr]] to keep his [[Scimitar assault bomber]] in the orbit.

{{Droid-stub}}
